zotero.abstractNote: We propose the Kernel Method of Moments (KMM), a framework for estimation and inference in models defined by conditional moment restrictions. KMM generalizes the Generalized Method of Moments (GMM) by using a continuum of moment conditions indexed by a reproducing kernel Hilbert space. This allows for the use of non-parametric instruments and provides a flexible way to incorporate prior knowledge. We show that KMM is consistent and asymptotically normal, and we provide a computationally efficient implementation. We demonstrate the effectiveness of KMM on a variety of tasks, including causal inference, instrumental variable regression, and density ratio estimation.
